title: Sum even numbers
prompt: Print the sum of all even numbers from 1 to 10.

title: Reverse a word
prompt: Read one word from input and print it in reverse order.

title: Find max value
prompt: Print the largest number in the array { 12, 7, 42, 19, 3 }.

title: Count the vowels
prompt: Read a word from input and print how many vowels (a, e, i, o, u) it contains.

title: Factorial of five
Sum 1 to 100
prompt: Print the sum of all integers from 1 to 100.
